title: a normal change folds one requirement into the central spec

commands.stdoutTail:
[companion] Folded feature deltas into living spec(s): todos (examples/bench-sandboxes/ls-r3-central/specs/001-add-due-dates/.spec-context.json)
[companion] Living-spec fold: todos ← +1 added, ~0 modified, -0 removed, ↻0 renamed (capabilities/todos/spec.md)

livingSpec.before:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list
livingSpec.after:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list

### Users can set a due date on a todo

#### Scenario: set a due date
- WHEN a user picks a date for a todo
- THEN the todo shows the due date
livingSpec.unifiedDiff:
diff --git abefore.md bafter.md
index 30218669..a5503ed7 100644
--- abefore.md
+++ bafter.md
@@ -5,3 +5,9 @@
 #### Scenario: add a todo
 - WHEN a user types text and submits
 - THEN a todo appears in the list
+
+### Users can set a due date on a todo
+
+#### Scenario: set a due date
+- WHEN a user picks a date for a todo
+- THEN the todo shows the due date

checks.detail: re-applying deltas to the after-spec is a byte no-op
